name: Cousins
overview: Based on the double murders in 1965 of Issie Fourie and Petro Nel in the Free State province town of Odendaalsrus who were both abducted and murdered. Issie's brother, André decided to bring the perpetrator to justice - something that took 18 years.

trailers.title: Amptelike Lokprent: Niggies | S1 | Begin 25 Maart 2025 | kykNET
